overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character exploring a lush Japanese landscape. The character traverses rocky cliffs with waterfalls, dense bamboo forests, crosses a wooden bridge, and approaches a traditional hot spring village before entering a building to interact with an NPC.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff edge overlooking canyon waterfall

events.description: character turns right to look down at waterfall and turquoise pool below

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the cliff edge, pausing to observe the waterfall and canyon below

entered.detail: gray stone cliff formation with moss patches forming the walking surface
multi-tiered waterfall flowing down into the canyon below
bright blue-green water pool at the base of the waterfall
dense bamboo forest visible in the distance across the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a rocky cliff edge overlooking a dramatic canyon with a cascading waterfall feeding into a turquoise pool below. The environment is open and sunlit with sparse vegetation, and dense bamboo forests are visible in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense bamboo forest path with traditional house

events.description: character enters dense bamboo forest from open cliffside

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow dirt path through towering bamboo stalks

entered.detail: small traditional Japanese house with dark wooden walls and tiled roof partially hidden by bamboo

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open cliff into a dense bamboo forest where the light becomes diffused and green-tinted. A traditional wooden house appears on the left side of the path, and the waterfall is no longer visible behind the thick vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden footbridge crossing with merchant stall

events.description: character crosses from bamboo forest onto wooden footbridge over water
character slows slightly while passing merchant stall on the left

agents.ego_description: crossing a wooden footbridge and continuing along a path past a merchant's stall

notable_agents.action: merchant standing behind a wooden stall with goods displayed

entered.detail: rustic wooden bridge made of logs and planks crossing over the water
steaming turquoise hot spring pools with mist rising from the surface
wooden market stall with colorful goods and fabric coverings

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the bamboo forest onto a wooden footbridge spanning the turquoise water. Steam rises from hot spring pools visible on the left, and a merchant stall appears along the path. The environment opens up again as the character approaches a village area.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional hot spring village with steaming pools

events.description: character enters area with heavy steam fog rising from hot springs
character steps from wooden walkway onto stone stepping stones crossing the pool

agents.ego_description: walking through the steaming hot spring area, crossing stone paths between the pools

entered.detail: traditional Japanese stone lanterns standing in the water between pools
large traditional wooden inn with curved roof and moss-covered beams
large reddish-brown ceramic pot decorating the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a mystical hot spring village filled with rising steam. Stone lanterns stand in the turquoise pools, and a large traditional inn building looms ahead through the mist. The character crosses stone stepping stones and wooden walkways surrounded by the steaming water.

events.description: character enters the dark interior of the traditional building from the bright exterior
character approaches and interacts with NPC sitting inside the building

agents.ego_description: walking into the dimly lit building and approaching a seated villager

notable_agents.action: villager sitting on a wooden bench who stands up as the character approaches

entered.detail: dimly lit interior space with wooden floors, fabric dividers, and hanging lanterns

segments.scene_description: The character enters the dark interior of the traditional inn, leaving the steamy hot springs behind. Inside, the lighting is warm and subdued with wooden architecture. The character approaches a villager sitting on a bench who stands up to face them, suggesting an interaction or dialogue is about to occur.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open cliffside through a dense forest and into a misty village, ending within the dim interior of a traditional building. It begins on a rocky precipice overlooking a cascading waterfall and turquoise pool before the character moves away from the sunlight and into a thick bamboo forest where the light becomes diffused and green-tinted. As the character emerges from the vegetation, the scene opens onto a wooden footbridge spanning the water, passing a merchant stall as steam begins to rise from nearby hot spring pools. The camera then follows the character through a mystical village of stone lanterns and stepping stones shrouded in mist, moving toward a large traditional inn. Finally, the environment shifts from the steamy outdoors to the warm, subdued lighting of the inn's interior, where the character approaches a waiting villager.
